author: ArtinŌr
description: ArtinŌr's Advanced Kanban, A powerful kanban board. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: ArtinŌr
manifest.description: A powerful kanban board. Markdown-backed boards with drag & drop, due dates, tags, WIP limits, checklists, note links, archive, search/filter and multiple boards.
manifest.name: Artin0rs Advanced Kanban

name: Artin0rs Advanced Kanban

releases.author: Artin0r
releases.description: ## What's inside: --- - Plain Markdown boards | one .md file per board, human-editable and git-friendly - Drag & drop | cards between columns, columns reorderable - Rich cards | due dates, recurring tasks, tags, custom fields, inline checklists with progress - Archive column | archive instead of delete; recurring cards reschedule automatically - Filters | live search + tag chips - Auto-move | cards jump to a target column when all checklist items are done - Import/Export | CSV (full metadata) and Trello-compatible JSON - Card templates | reusable templates for quick creation - Embedded boards | live kanban blocks inside any note
